Name: Apollo APL-C 'Apple Core'
Details: The Apollo APL-C, also known as the Apple Core, dates to the time of the Jihad. Clan Sea Fox, taking advantage of all the destroyed chassis and salvage of the Jihad, was able to aquire a large number of spare Apollo frames at dirt cheap prices, although they were completely devoid of equipment. Never ones to let useful equipment go to waste, they rebuilt the mechs using uprated Clan-spec engines and Endo-Steel and hid twin Clan-spec Medium Pulse Lasers and ER Medium Lasers in the arms. These changes, along with using Clan-spec LRM-5s that they had lying in surplus, allowed them to turn the humble firesupport mech into a devastating hidden tiger, equally adept at providing heavy fire support and unleashing heavy firepower on any mech that thinks an unguarded fire support lance is easy pickings.
